x-enumeration-literals.name: Business Current Account
x-enumeration-literals.description: Supports business transactions, payroll, invoicing, often with higher transaction limits.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Standard Current Account
x-enumeration-literals.description: Basic account for everyday banking: deposits, withdrawals, bill payments.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Premium or Packaged Current Account
x-enumeration-literals.description: Offers extra benefits (insurance, travel perks, preferential rates) for a monthly fee.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Student Current Account
x-enumeration-literals.description: Tailored for students, usually with no fees, free overdraft, and student-related perks.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Youth Current Account
x-enumeration-literals.description: Simplified accounts with parental oversight, limited features, no overdraft.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Joint Current Account
x-enumeration-literals.description: Shared between two or more account holders with equal access.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Salary Account
x-enumeration-literals.description: Designed for salary deposits from employer, may include benefits like instant overdraft.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Foreign Currency Current Account
x-enumeration-literals.description: Maintains balances in foreign currencies (USD, EUR, etc.) for international needs.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Islamic Current Account
x-enumeration-literals.description: Shariah-compliant account without interest, may include profit-sharing.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Basic Bank Account
x-enumeration-literals.description: Minimal feature account, no overdraft, designed for financial inclusion.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Private Banking Current Account
x-enumeration-literals.description: High-value account with personalized RM support, wealth management integration.
